zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor於大約1130年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾斯肯福利特時，她的父親Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing21歲，母親Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo11歲。她與Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor于大约1130年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾斯肯福利特时，她的父亲Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing21岁，母亲Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo11岁。她与Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Ifor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; sometimes Anglicized as   Ivor  , but there is no connection in origin between the two names.

nameMeanings.name: Bach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Zachary  , also used as an independent given name.

variants.name: Zachary
meanings: vernacular form of the New Testament Greek name Zacharias, a form of Hebrew Zechariah ‘God has remembered’. This was the name of the father of John the Baptist, who underwent a temporary period of dumbness for his lack of faith (Luke 1), and of a more obscure figure, Zacharias son of Barachias, who was slain ‘between the temple and the altar’ (Matthew 23:35; Luke 11:51). In the United States it is familiar as the name of a 19th-century president, Zachary Taylor . Since the 1990s the name has been remarkably popular in the English-speaking world, especially in the United States.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Plâs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ifor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; sometimes Anglicized as   Ivor  , but there is no connection in origin between the two names.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor was born about 1130, in Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing, was 21 and her mother, Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, was 11. She married Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor est née environ 1130, à Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor um 1130 in Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing 21 und ihre Mutter Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo 11. Sie hat in Wales, United Kingdom Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor è nata il circa 1130 nel Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Iforが約1130年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアスケンフリスで生まれた時，父Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssingは21歳，母Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandiloは11歳であった。イギリスウェールズでMorgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스켄프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor родилась около 1130 г. в местности скенфрит, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor nació aproximadamente 1130, en Skenfrith, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys ab Arthfael King of Glywyssing, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Morgan Ap Cariadog Ap Gwyrgant en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
